body.title: Carve 20% holdout before classifiers see data
body.result: carve_holdout.py written + 3 tests pass; holdout column exists (from T-competition-schema); stratified 20% split verified (3428181e)
body.intention: I intend that the holdout set is carved before either classifier is built so neither classifier can have seen the eval data.
body.description:
Add a `holdout` boolean column to competition.memories, then mark a stratified 20% of rows per memory_type as holdout=true. Neither classifier touches these rows during training. Eval harness uses them exclusively.

**Affected files:** New script `lab/competition/carve_holdout.py`; migration to add holdout column to competition.memories
**Design rules:** Stratified split (proportional per memory_type) to avoid eval set lacking rare types
**Scope boundary:** Column addition + row marking only. No reads of holdout rows by anything until eval harness runs.
**Completion criteria:** competition.memories has holdout column; ~20% per type marked holdout=true; counts logged per type.
